extensionDescription.message: K’achachata offline diff comparación herramienta qillqañataki ukhamaraki código ukataki.
extensionDescription.description: Description shown in the Chrome Web Store

headerSubtitle.message: Qillqata, chimpu, JSON, ukat juk’ampinakat uñakipt’aña — jan internetan

placeholderOriginal.message: Aka chiqan qillqat original jan ukax código ukar lip’katañamawa...

placeholderModified.message: Aka chiqan mayjt’at qillqat jan ukax código ukar lip’katayaña...

emptyStateBody.message: Panpacha paneles ukar qillqat ch’iqt’aña ukat Comparar ukar ch’iqt’aña — jan ukax Ctrl+Enter ukar ch’iqt’aña

identicalBody.message: Uka pä amuyunakanx janiw mayjt’awinakax jikxataskänti.

errorLargeInput.message: Input ukax wali jach’awa. Diff ukax mä juk’a pachakiw...

errorBothEmpty.message: Janïr uñakipt’kasax pä paneles ukar contenido ukar lip’katañamawa.

errorOneEmpty.message: Mä panel ukax ch’usawa. Ukhamaraki, panpacha paneles ukan contenido uñacht’ayaña.

formatJSONError.message: Mä jan ukax pä panel ukan JSON jan wali.

resultsPanelTitle.message: Diff Resultados ukax mä juk’a pachanakanwa
